Super fast response and resolution to an issue! Thank you.
Could be faster but very good attention

turns.text: I can help you with that! To get started, could you let me know which of the following applies to your situation?
My own duplicate profiles
Got it! Could you share the links or Player IDs for both profiles? If you don't have the URLs, just provide the display names and location for each profile.
Owen gilchrist edmonton
Thanks! Do you have a second profile with the same or a similar name? If so, could you share the link, Player ID, or display name and location for that duplicate profile?
Owen gilchrist edmonton

Thanks — so both profiles appear to have the same name and location: **Owen Gilchrist, Edmonton**.

Which of these two profiles would you like to keep as your primary account? If you have a profile URL (e.g., https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/...) for either, that would help the team identify the right one.
I think I got charged for 12 recently but  I did not approved this
I can help you look into that unexpected charge. Let me connect you with the right support for billing and subscription questions.

sorry hear you were charged unexpectedly. Let's get this sorted out for you.

To look into this, I'll need a few details:

- What is the email address on your UTR Sports account?
- Do you know which platform the charge came from (web, iOS App Store, or Google Play)?
- What was the exact charge amount and date?
[email], web, $12, apr 30
Thank you for those details, Nina. Let me look into this for you.
Since you're reporting an unexpected charge of $12 on April 30 that you didn't approve, I'll escalate this to our support team right away so they can investigate and assist with a potential refund.

Your case has been submitted and our support team will look into the $12 charge [location]30 on your account. You can expect a follow-up at [email].

In the meantime, if you'd like to prevent any further charges, you can cancel your subscription by going to your profile icon on the UTR Sports website, selecting Subscriptions, and clicking Cancel Subscription.

Is there anything else I can help you with?
is there a reference or ticket number?
Yes! Your ticket number is 824498. You can use this as a reference when following up with our support team. Is there anything else I can help you with?
got it! thank
You're welcome! Hope we get that sorted out for you quickly. Take care! 😊
do you have any promotion for flex league in florida

I don't have any specific information about current promotions for Flex Leagues [location]. For the most up-to-date details on available leagues and any promotions in your area, I'd recommend checking the UTR Sports platform directly or connecting with our support team.

Would you like me to help you with anything else related to Flex Leagues, or is there something else I can assist you with?
why some scores are pending

Scores show as "pending" because they are waiting for the other player to confirm them. Here's how it works:

When someone posts a score against you, you receive a notification and have the option to either confirm or deny it. Until the other player takes action, the score remains in a pending state.

Once confirmed, the score will appear on your player profile and count toward your UTR rating. If denied, the status changes to "Rejected."

You can view your pending results on your home dashboard after logging in at utrsports.net.

Is there a specific pending score you're having trouble with? happy help further!
is this how it works for flex league scores?

Yes, Flex League scores work similarly but with a few specific details:

Once a score is posted, the opposing player has up to 7 days to confirm or deny it. If no action is taken within that time, the match is automatically confirmed.

A couple of things to keep in mind:

- Scores should be posted by the winning player.
- Your opponent won't be able to confirm through the mobile app, so it's recommended they confirm on the UTR Sports website.
- If a match is denied, an email to your Flex League Manager is needed to explain why.
- If there's a disagreement on the score, you can fill out a match protest form and the UTR Sports team or local League Manager will make the final call.

Is there anything else about Flex League scores I can help you with?
do you know any upcoming flex event for next week?

I don't have access to real-time event listings or schedules, so unable check upcoming Flex League events for next week.

I'd recommend browsing directly on the UTR Sports platform at utrsports.net to find available Flex League events in your area.

Is there anything else I can help you with?
that's all thanks
You're welcome! Have a great time on the courts! 🎾 Feel free to reach out anytime if you need help. Goodbye!
